meta.title: Baara - Work-based recruitment
meta.description: Baara revolutionizes tech recruitment. Show your work, not just your CV.

hero.title: Evidence-based
hero.subtitle: Connect tech talents to companies that value real skills. Show your work, get the opportunities you deserve.

features.label: Why Baara
features.title: A new approach to recruitment
features.description: No more generic CVs and endless interviews. Let your work speak for itself.

portfolio.title: Work portfolio
portfolio.description: Showcase your projects, open-source contributions, and concrete achievements. Your work speaks for you.

matching.title: Smart matching
matching.description: Our algorithm connects your expertise to relevant opportunities. No spam, only matching missions.

speed.title: Simplified process
speed.description: Fewer steps, more transparency. Recruiters see directly what you can do.

step1.title: Create your profile
step1.description: Import your GitHub projects, add your achievements and build a portfolio that represents you.

step2.title: Get discovered
step2.description: Recruiters browse portfolios and find talents that match their needs.

step3.title: Connect
step3.description: Exchange directly with companies interested in your work. No CV, no cover letter.

cta.title: Ready to make a change?
cta.description: Join the pilot program and be among the first to experience next-generation recruitment.
cta.freeAccess: Free access during the pilot program
